title: B7. Sarcasm Classification
label: mx1_transmute_20
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
Transmuted a sarcasm classification task into a structured reasoning protocol for a downstream agent.
node_root_helper_01 (transmuted_child): ### TASK: Sarcasm Classification and Pattern Extraction

**OBJECTIVE:**
Analyze three specific text inputs to determine their level of sarcasm and encode the results into a single 3-bit binary pattern.

**REASONING FRAMEWORK:**
1. **Linguistic Analysis:** Fo
final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: N/A
JUSTIFICATION: Input data for Reddit replies was not provided.
